name: Kun Pao Shrimp B1
recipeInstructions:
------------------------
BATTER
-----------
1 cup All-purpose flour
1/2 cup Cornstarch
1 Egg
1/2 teaspoon Baking powder
Peel and devein shrimp, then dry thoroughly. Butterfly the shrimp by splitting from the back but not cutting through. Dip the shrimp in batter. Deep fry the shrimp in 2 inches of oil for about 3 minutes.
Preheat wok or frying pan with 1 tablespoon corn oil. Add peppers, garlic, onions, soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar. Stir. Add fried shrimp. Baste with sauce. Pour on sesame oil. Serve immediately.
Mix dry ingredients gradually with water until the mixture reaches the consistency of pancake batter.
BATTER: Mix dry ingredients. Gradually add water until mixture is the consistency of pancake batter. When preparing the shrimp, use both the green and white parts of the onion for flavor.
Always preheat wok before adding oil to prevent additional ingredients from sticking.
Temperature (s): HOT
Effort: AVERAGE
Time: 00:30
Occasion: HOLIDAY
